name: hygon-dcu-kernel-optimizer
description: Codex skills and scripts for generating Hygon DCU HIP baselines from references and iteratively optimizing HIP/CK Tile kernels.

author.name: Local Hygon DCU Kernel Optimizer Maintainers

interface.shortDescription: Generate and optimize Hygon HIP kernels.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex skills for Hygon DCU work: generate correctness-first HIP baselines from Torch, Triton, TileLang, or Python references, then run a hipprof/dccobjdump-guided iterative optimizer for HIP and CK Tile kernels. Remote execution is intentionally delegated to the target project's own remote workflow.
interface.developerName: Local Hygon DCU Kernel Optimizer Maintainers
defaultPrompt: Generate a Hygon HIP baseline from this ref and shape.
Optimize this Hygon HIP kernel for my DCU target.
Run the Hygon optimizer using this project's remote workflow.
